primary.note: Extremely high-volume informational keyword with massive traffic potential. Schedule-focused intent with strong betting crossover during live tournament.

competitor_analysis.serp_overview: SERP for 'world cup schedule' is dominated by FIFA.com, ESPN, and major sports news outlets. Affiliate betting sites are underrepresented on this informational query, creating an opportunity to capture schedule-intent traffic and funnel it toward betting content. The 48-team expansion creates fresh content opportunities as most existing pages cover the old 32-team format.
key_insights: Primary keyword 63K/mo with traffic potential of 227K - one of the highest-volume World Cup terms
48-team format is new for 2026, creating content freshness advantage over recycled 32-team guides
Three host countries (US/Mexico/Canada) adds unique venue and schedule complexity competitors struggle to cover comprehensively
Schedule content has strong live-event betting crossover - users checking schedules are primed for match betting
Low affiliate competition on this informational query means easier ranking for a well-structured page
Multiple keyword variants (schedule, dates, fixtures) all point to same search intent - one comprehensive page can capture all

content_gaps: Comprehensive round-by-round schedule breakdown with dates for all tournament phases
Detailed venue and host city guide across all three countries (US, Mexico, Canada)
TV schedule and kick-off times by time zone for US viewers
Integration of schedule information with match betting opportunities per round
48-team format explanation with group stage structure and progression rules
Mobile-friendly schedule reference that doubles as a betting companion during the tournament
competitor_analysis.competitive_advantage: First comprehensive World Cup 2026 schedule page that combines detailed fixture information across all three host countries with actionable betting guidance per match round. The informational-first approach captures high-volume schedule searches while naturally converting to betting engagement.

brand_selection.rationale: Primary keyword at 63,000/mo with 227K traffic potential is among the highest-volume World Cup terms. Seven brands warranted for this traffic level. Focus on sportsbooks with strong live/in-game betting features since schedule pages attract users during live matches.
